name: Routing Subspaces: Auditing Evaluation-to-Deployment Mismatch in Fine-Tuned Language Models
summary: arXiv:2607.20436v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safety evaluations often assume that behavior observed during testing reflects behavior in ordinary use, but fine-tuning can break this assumption....
description: arXiv:2607.20436v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safety evaluations often assume that behavior observed during testing reflects behavior in ordinary use, but fine-tuning can break this assumption. A checkpoint can appear fixed under evaluation-style prompts while the same behavior persists under ordinary-use prompts. Output scores reveal this mismatch but do not locate it. We investigate wheth...
author: Phongsakon Mark Konrad, Toygar Tanyel, Serkan Ayvaz
